message.content:
Deep dive into ~/antonio/mms/system/docs/MMS_COMPLETE_SPECIFICATION.md (8922 lines, 294KB):

1. Map the document structure - list all chapters and sections with line numbers
2. Identify sections containing UNIQUE RESEARCH:
   - Market analysis (competitors, SignatureRail, Railnova, etc.)
   - Railway domain knowledge (maintenance intervals, EN standards, ECM/RAMS)
   - Mathematical formulas (optimization, statistics)
   - UX research (design patterns, accessibility)
   
3. Note sections that are:
   - Historical/outdated (can be removed)
   - Implementation details (may need updating for PatternFly v6)
   - Core domain knowledge (must preserve)

4. Estimate which sections are unique vs duplicated in other docs.

Read the file in chunks (2000 lines at a time) to get full coverage.
